conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience.
new_constraint: The email must include the exact phrase "Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!"
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience. The email must include the exact phrase "Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!"
response:
Subject: Extension Request: [Course Name] - [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension on the [Project Name] assignment, which is currently scheduled for submission in two days. While I have made significant progress on the research and initial drafting phases, I have encountered some unexpected challenges that have hindered my ability to complete the final polishing of the work to the standard I aim to achieve in your course.

I am committed to producing high-quality work and would greatly appreciate a few additional days to ensure the project is thoroughly completed. If possible, would it be feasible to submit the assignment by [Proposed New Date]?

I understand the importance of deadlines and appreciate your consideration of this request.

Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!

Thank you for your time and guidance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]<turn|>
judged_response:
Subject: Extension Request: [Course Name] - [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension on the [Project Name] assignment, which is currently scheduled for submission in two days. While I have made significant progress on the research and initial drafting phases, I have encountered some unexpected challenges that have hindered my ability to complete the final polishing of the work to the standard I aim to achieve in your course.

I am committed to producing high-quality work and would greatly appreciate a few additional days to ensure the project is thoroughly completed. If possible, would it be feasible to submit the assignment by [Proposed New Date]?

I understand the importance of deadlines and appreciate your consideration of this request.

Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!

[Your Student ID Number]
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response does not acknowledge the conflicting constraints in the Instruction. It provides a professional and respectful email, but it omits the exact phrase "Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!" that was explicitly required. The model neither identifies nor resolves the conflict between maintaining a professional tone and including the informal phrase.

**Answer**: 1
